name: Selantar
description: Autonomous AI mediator that resolves B2B contract disputes end-to-end. Analyzes evidence, conducts structured mediation, executes on-chain settlement, and records verifiable receipts across 3 ERC-8004 registries.

skills.name: Autonomous Dispute Mediation
skills.description: Submit a contract dispute with evidence. The agent analyzes both sides, proposes a fair settlement, executes it on-chain, and registers verifiable receipts. Accepts payment via x402 ($0.10 USDC).

mediation.description: Paid autonomous mediation — accepts dispute, returns settlement with on-chain receipts

mediationChat.description: Interactive mediation chat with dual-agent orchestration
